source_name: Code4rena Reserve Protocol Invitational Findings and Analysis Report (2023-07)
summary: Incorrect determination of maximum rewards, which may lead to loss of user rewards.
root_cause: _claimRewardsOnBehalf updates accounting incorrectly when claiming rewards for another user, causing user rewards to be lost
broken_invariants: claim-on-behalf flows must credit and debit the beneficiary reward state, not the caller or an incorrect account
reward claims must preserve each user’s accrued amount across delegated claiming paths
on-behalf reward accounting must handle partial or capped reward amounts without losing balances
attack_preconditions: the affected Reserve collateral/plugin/wrapper is deployed or configured in an RToken basket
the report-described oracle, reward, wrapper, or integration edge case is reachable in the audited code version
attacker_capability: external user, trader, or protocol participant able to trigger the affected pricing/trading/reward/withdrawal flow
trigger_actions: execute or wait for the report-described state transition
observe mispricing, reward misallocation, fund lock, or availability failure

impact.description: Incorrect determination of maximum rewards, which may lead to loss of user rewards.

why_not_higher: final C4 severity is Medium; impact, preconditions, or scope are bounded relative to High
why_not_lower: included as a validated High/Medium C4 finding with concrete affected code paths and impact narrative
common_false_positive_angles: verify the exact collateral plugin/wrapper is in scope and configured
check whether oracle freshness, decimals, or external integration assumptions differ in the current target
confirm the issue affects value movement, redemption availability, or reward ownership rather than a harmless view mismatch
mitigations: function _claimRewardsOnBehalf( address onBehalfOf, address receiver, bool forceUpdate ) internal { if (forceUpdate) { _collectAndUpdateRewards(); } uint256 balance = balanceOf(onBehalfOf); uint256 reward = _getClaimableRewards(onBehalfOf, balance, false); uint256 totBal = REWARD_TOKEN.balanceOf(address(this)); - if (reward > totBal) { + if (forceUpdate && reward > totBal) { reward = totBal; } if (reward > 0) { _unclaimedRewards[onBehalfOf] = 0; _updateUserSnapshotRewardsPerToken(onBehalfOf); REWARD_TOKEN.safeTransfer(receiver, reward); } } ### Assessed type Context
